untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'acceleration rate' (rate of change of momentum) and 'rate of change of momentum > 0' which cannot be directly expressed with allowed indicators. The concept of 'acceleration itself accelerating' (second derivative of price) is not available in the indicator set. Used macd_hist as proxy for momentum acceleration, but this is an approximation rather than true acceleration measurement.
translation_notes: Converted 'price acceleration > 1.5 stddev' to returns as percentage deviation proxy. Used macd_hist to approximate momentum acceleration. Vol_ratio_20 directly maps to volume multiplier condition. Signal is context-dependent (both LONG and SHORT entries based on trend direction), so included both entry_long and entry_short conditions with opposite logic.
